verdict_reason: The engineering layer does not conflate traditions. It uses 'buddhi-yoga' as the doctrinal hinge and the source pack records the four-way disagreement carefully (Shankara: jñāna-mature equanimity; Ramanuja: result-renunciation operational discipline; Prabhupada: devotional-service buddhi; Mukundananda: intellect-in-divine-knowledge). The engineering body simplifies toward the Shankara/Ramanuja convergence — 'discriminating intelligence operating with equanimity' — which is the doctrinal floor common to all four; this is honest simplification rather than tradition-conflation. The harshness of kṛpaṇa is preserved in the structural sense (binding-by-own-causality) that both Advaita and Vishishtadvaita affirm; no tradition is forced into a position it does not hold. The cross-reference to 18.66 (sarva-dharmān parityajya) correctly flags 2.49's 'buddhau śaraṇam' as an early-chapter form of śaraṇāgati grammar without collapsing the two. Pass.
